crons._comment: Runs daily at 14:00 UTC = 7:00 am America/Los_Angeles (PDT, UTC-7). Adjust to 15:00 UTC in winter (PST, UTC-8).
Runs every Sunday at 14:00 UTC = 7:00 am America/Los_Angeles (PDT). See note above for PST.
Runs daily at 15:00 UTC = 7:00 am America/Los_Angeles (PDT, UTC-7; 8:00 am in PST/UTC-8). Sends yesterday's complete cost summary to BUDGET_ALERT_RECIPIENT.
